designNotes.aesthetic: The revision keeps the warm desert workshop identity, combining sandstone and cream surfaces with rust panels, charcoal mechanical lines, and large editorial serif headlines. Supporting copy is darker and larger so the practical information now carries more visual weight.
designNotes.signatureMove: The service wheel remains the defining interaction on wide screens. On phones, the crowded labels move into three full width controls beneath a simplified wheel while all service details remain visible in a direct list.
designNotes.rationale: The revised layout preserves the distinctive wheel language and varied section rhythm while improving mobile targets, text contrast, service differentiation, and component spacing. The hero chainring now fits fully inside its rust panel. Because no address, hours, phone number, or email were confirmed, the visit section provides concise honest guidance instead of inventing shop details.
